creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #5)

Thanks for the info, but why would behavior differ between 12.1-RELEASE and 12.2-RC2?

Also, I'm not using 21 yet:

FreeBSD mako.acadix  bacon ~ 1005: pkg info | grep xorg-server
xorg-server-1.20.9,1           X.Org X server and related programs

I'm not up on the internal details of Xorg, but I'm thinking the libinput tweak should work universally.  If I find out otherwise during testing I'll report back.
